summary: Recent updates in the Utils area of Firefox focused on refining the accuracy of profiling related to video resizing. Specifically, an incorrect check that was previously in place, called HasVideo(), has been removed when reporting the video resize profiler marker. This change enhances the reliability of performance metrics captured during video playback, ultimately helping developers better understand how their video content is performing within the browser, which is important for optimizing user experience. _Users may not notice visible changes immediately, but this improvement aids in streamlining video playback performance over time._
